category_sources: Official Saxon-HE README says Saxon is an XSLT, XQuery, and XPath processor for Java and .NET platforms.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use Saxon-HE.
source_facts.name gives saxon as the package command/formula name.
docs_sources: Official Saxon-HE GitHub README points to Saxonica resources and release information.
Official Saxonica documentation site provides Saxon documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/Saxonica/Saxon-HE; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official Saxon-HE README identifies XSLT 3.0, XQuery 3.1, XPath 3.1, Java, and .NET platforms.
source_facts.description identifies XSLT and XQuery processing.
